projects.title: Low dimensional topology
projects.description: Investigating mathematics of knots, links, spatial graphs, and their invariants.

projects.title: Complex topology biopolymers
projects.description: Investigating structure, function, evolution, and dynamics of complex-topologybiopolymers, such as proteins, DNA, and RNA, or chemical compounds.

projects.title: Polymer field-theoretic description
projects.description: Investigating statistics and field theoretic description of polymers, especially biopolymers and inclusion of complex topology.

projects.title: Topology of biochemical spaces
projects.description: Investigating the mathematic structure of spaces of compounds and sequences - their geometry, topology, and dynamics.

projects.title: Medicinal bioinformatics
projects.description: Analyzing radiological images and creating tools for automated analysis.Investigating the medical applications of bioinformatics, such as drug discovery, drug design, and drug development.

projects.title: Medical imaging analysis
projects.description: Analyzing radiological images and creating tools for automated analysis.
